category_sources: source_facts.description describes vhs as a CLI home video recorder, and the official project is a terminal recording tool.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides vhs; source_facts.homepage points to Charmbracelet's official VHS repository, where the project name is styled VHS.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; its README is the primary official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/charmbracelet/vhs, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states CLI home video recorder; source_facts.executables lists vhs as a CLI executable.
